CustomField.description: Product qualification criteria used by the guided selling process.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used by guided selling to match products to the customer's primary goal.
CustomField.label: Primary Goal

value.fullName: Deploy a complete on-premise server infrastructure solution
value.label: Deploy a complete on-premise server infrastructure solution

value.fullName: Integrate and manage APIs or cloud services
value.label: Integrate and manage APIs or cloud services

value.fullName: Store and manage large volumes of data
value.label: Store and manage large volumes of data
